What our customers say about their experience.

I needed 80 pages of my final year project printed and spiral bound urgently. They finished it in under 30 minutes — print quality was sharp and the binding looked professional. I've been coming here since first year and they never disappoint.

We get our office letterheads, visiting cards, and daily xerox done here. The uncle and his team are very reliable — pricing is always fair and they remember our preferences. Best print shop in Virar West, hands down.

Got passport photos done for my whole family — 4 sets in 10 minutes flat. The photos were accepted at the passport office without any issues. Very affordable at ₹30 per set. Will definitely come back for lamination and ID cards.

I WhatsApped my resume file at 11 AM and picked up 20 printed copies by 11:30. Clean formatting, good paper quality. They even helped me adjust the margins. This is my go-to shop for all document work near Ram Mandir Road.

Bulk xerox of 500+ pages for our coaching class notes — done same day, neatly organized. The per-page rate for bulk is very reasonable. They handle large orders without any fuss. Open till 9 PM which is very convenient for us.

Got my marksheets and certificates laminated here. Quick service, clean finish, no bubbles. The shop has everything — stationery, pens, files, all in one place. Very helpful staff. Located right near Old Viva College so easy to find.

Quick guidance before you visit or place your print order on WhatsApp.
Do you accept urgent same-day print orders?
Yes. Most urgent print and xerox jobs are completed the same day depending on queue and file size.
Can I send files on WhatsApp before coming to the shop?
Absolutely. Share your file and required quantity on WhatsApp, and we will confirm timing and price quickly.
Do you provide student discounts for project prints?
Yes, student-friendly pricing is available for selected services and bulk project printing requests.
Which payment options are available at the shop?
You can pay via UPI, cash, and common digital methods available at local retail counters.
Can offices place recurring monthly print orders?
Yes. Regular office requirements can be planned with priority turnaround and quantity-based rates.
